segments.text: Lesson 133—Sensational News.
Listen to the tape, then answer this question.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

segments.text: What reasons did Karen Marsh give for wanting to retire?

translations.zh-Hans: 卡伦·马什说她想退休的理由是什么？

segments.text: Have you just made a new film, Miss Marsh?

translations.zh-Hans: 马什小姐，您刚拍完一部新电影吗？

segments.text: Yes, I have.
Are you going to make another?
No, I'm not.
I'm going to retire.
I feel very tired.
I don't want to make another film for a long time.

translations.zh-Hans: 我很长一段时间都不想再拍电影了。

segments.text: Let's buy a newspaper, Liz.
Listen to this.
Karen Marsh—Sensational News.
By Our Reporter, Alan Jones.

translations.zh-Hans: 本报记者艾伦·琼斯报道。

segments.text: Karen Marsh arrived at London Airport today.

translations.zh-Hans: 卡伦·马什今天抵达伦敦机场。

segments.text: She was wearing a blue dress and a mink coat.

translations.zh-Hans: 她身穿蓝色连衣裙和一件貂皮大衣。

segments.text: She told me she had just made a new film.

translations.zh-Hans: 她告诉我，她刚拍完一部新电影。

segments.text: She said she was not going to make another.

translations.zh-Hans: 她说她不准备再拍一部。

segments.text: She said she was going to retire.
She told reporters she felt very tired and didn't want to make another film for a long time.

translations.zh-Hans: 她告诉记者，她感到很累，很长一段时间内都不想再拍电影。

segments.text: I wonder why.
